Description: Basic low conversion gain sensor profile. Photon input 1.0 maps to SensorFWC electrons.
Notes: LCG and HCG profiles intentionally use separate read-noise seeds.
ShotNoise seed is shared with BasicSensorHCG for LCG/HCG HDR simulations.
PRNU/PFPN/Dark seeds are shared with BasicSensorHCG because fixed-pattern sources are sensor-position stable.
